2026-04-16T07:49:38.0835408Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0835958Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0836399Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0836768Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0837096Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0837351Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0837519Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0837711Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-16T07:49:38.0838126Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-16T07:49:38.0838629Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:38.0839249Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
